---
title: "👋 Welcome to Reha's Analytics Lab"
sidebar: false
---

Hey there! I'm **Muhammed Reha Özdemir**, an industrial engineering graduate student at Hacettepe University. This is my personal corner of the internet where I share data analyses, course projects, and the occasional thought that survives peer review by my own brain.

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
📊 Currently working on: **Trends in University Department Preferences in Turkey (2018–2025)**
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## What's here?

[**About Me**](about.qmd) — Who I am, where I've been, and what tools I pretend to know.

[**My Posts**](posts.qmd) — Data-driven takes on things that caught my attention.

[**EMU660 Coursework**](assignments.qmd) — Assignments and a full-scale data analytics project for the Decision Making with Analytics course at Hacettepe University.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) and too much coffee. ☕*
